frame_analyses.description: Four circular marked targets are visible on the training surface with no instruments present
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup shows marked targets for placement guidance

frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic needle driver enters frame with suture and needle already loaded
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle appears properly loaded in needle driver

frame_analyses.description: Needle driver approaches the upper marked target for initial bite placement
Second instrument enters to assist with suture passage through first marked target
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate use of second instrument for tissue manipulation

frame_analyses.description: Both instruments working together to complete suture passage and pull suture through
Suture being positioned and prepared for second bite through the adjacent marked target
Needle driver placing second bite through the target area
Completing the second suture passage with both ends of suture now visible
Beginning first throw of knot construction with both suture ends positioned
Creating loops for surgeon's knot with two throws in the first knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appears to be constructing surgeon's knot

frame_analyses.description: Tightening the surgeon's knot with both instruments pulling suture ends
Beginning second throw in opposite direction to complete square knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching for knot security

frame_analyses.description: Continuing to form and tighten the second throw
Adding third throw for additional knot security
Completing and tightening the third throw of the knot
Final knot is complete with both suture ends visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears properly constructed and tight

frame_analyses.description: Scissors being positioned to cut the suture ends
Cutting one suture end close to the knot
Cutting the second suture end
Final view showing completed knot with both ends cut, connecting the two marked targets

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw
Good hand switching and knot reversal

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Good tissue approximation between marked targets with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Excellent performance with proper surgeon's knot, good hand switching, and precise suture placement. Clean execution with minimal wasted motion.
improvement_suggestions: Continue practicing to maintain this level of consistency
Consider slightly faster transitions between knot throws
strengths: Precise suture placement on marked targets
